title: Penne Penne Azhaigiren Lyrics Irumbu Kuthirai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Penne Penne
Singers: G.V.Prakash Kumar,
Bhavatharini, Yazhini
Music: G.V.Prakash Kumar
Movie: Irumbu Kuthirai
Lyrics: Thamarai

Penne Penne azhaigiren
andril aagi azhugiren
Penne Penne neeyum engae
endre thaedi thigaikkiren

Nee sollaadhaal mozhiyillai
nee sellaadhadhaal vazhiyillai
nee paaraadhadhaal oliyillai
nee thaaradhadhaal nizhal illai

Uyir ponaal pogattum
ippodhey paarthaaga vendum
naan unnai unnai.

Oh Penne Penne azhaigiren
andril aagi azhugiren

Naanum unnai kaanum varai
en vazhvil yedho kurai
unnai kanda annaal mudhal
andraadum moondraam pirai

Kaigal serkka, kangal korkka
naan ketteney anbil serai
Paarkkum podhey paavai seelai
kaanaamal pona kadhai.

Ennai vaa en raani
kettu ododi pakkathil vandhaen.
Kangal poi sonnadhaal
kaanal neerai thaan naan
paarthu nindren.

Saalai oraththil poothendral
roobaththil nee vandhaai
naan thaaney pullaangulal

Kaattrai thoodhaaga naan vida
kanne un koondhal kodhi paaraadho.
Un kannin mai poosi nee vida
kaattrum pennaagi ingu vaaraadho

Moonu Munooru aandugal
ondraai naam vazhndha niyabagam
Yengi naan petra en varam
haiyyo ippodhu yaaridam.

Unnai paaraadhu
muththam thaaraadhu
ini thoongaadhu en kangaley.

Penne Penne azhaigiren
andril aagi azhugiren
Penne Penne neeyum engae
endre thaedi thigaikkiren

Nee sollaadhaal mozhiyillai
nee sellaadhadhaal vazhiyillai
nee paaraadhadhaal oliyillai
nee thaaradhadhaal nizhal illai

Uyir ponaal pogattum
ippodhey paarthaaga vendum
naan unnai unnai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep feelings of longing and love, capturing the essence of emotional vulnerability.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Irumbu Kudhirai, the song reflects the protagonist's emotional turmoil and yearning for their beloved.

Who is the singer and music director of the song?

The song is sung by GV Prakash Kumar, who is also the music director, showcasing his dual talent.

When was the song released?

The song was released on August 10, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Penne Penne Azhaigiren, the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and longing, beautifully encapsulated through GV Prakash Kumar's emotive singing. The song serves as a poignant backdrop in Irumbu Kudhirai, highlighting the emotional struggles faced by the characters. With lyrics penned by Thamarai, it evokes a sense of nostalgia and heartache, making it relatable to anyone who has loved deeply. This melody is not just a song but an experience that resonates with the listener's heart.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Penne Penne Azhaigiren from the Irumbu Kudhirai soundtrack is a heartfelt melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With GV Prakash Kumar's soulful vocals and Thamarai's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into this enchanting track that perfectly blends emotion and melody, making it a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Oh girl, I am crying, and I am weeping inside. Oh girl, where are you? I am searching for you.
If you don't speak, there are no words; if you don't act, there is no way; if you don't look, there is no light; if you don't shine, there is no shadow.
Even if my life goes away, I need to see you right now.
Oh girl, I am crying, and I am weeping inside.
Until I see you, there is something missing in my life; if I see you, it will be like the first and third moon.
I listened with my hands joined and my eyes closed; the story of a girl who passed by without showing her beauty.
Come to me, my queen; I came running to you. When my eyes were deceived, I stood watching the flowing tears.
If you bloom in the street, you came in the form of a flower; I am the one who is left behind.
Oh girl, I am crying, and I am weeping inside.
As a messenger of the wind, I cannot leave; your hair is like a flame. Your eyes are so beautiful that the wind cannot come here.
Three or four men are one; we lived in memory. Oh, the blessing I received at birth, where is it now?
I cannot see you; I cannot kiss you; I cannot sleep anymore, my eyes.
Oh girl, I am crying, and I am weeping inside. Oh girl, where are you? I am searching for you.
If you don't speak, there are no words; if you don't act, there is no way; if you don't look, there is no light; if you don't shine, there is no shadow.
Even if my life goes away, I need to see you right now.
